## Description

Brief description of the changes and why they were made.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (change that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Research or safety enhancement

Closes #(issue number) or relates to #(issue number)

### Expected Behavior

What should happen when the change is tested.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (black, isort, flake8)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have added type hints to new functions
- [ ] I have added/updated docstrings with research citations where applicable
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`python evals/adversarial_tests.py`)
- [ ] I have tested with `pytest tests/` (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes do not reduce the safety/security posture of the agent
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` if this is a notable change
